name: Alert
mechanicalSummary: +5 to initiative, can't be surprised, hidden creatures don't gain advantage on attacks against you.

name: Charger
trigger: When using the Dash action and moving at least 10 ft straight toward a target
mechanicalSummary: When you Dash, make a melee weapon attack as a bonus action with +5 to the damage roll (or shove up to 10 ft).
notes: Grants a conditional bonus action attack.

name: Crossbow Expert
mechanicalSummary: Ignore loading property of crossbows. No disadvantage on ranged attacks while within 5 ft of hostile creature. When using Attack action with one-handed weapon, can use bonus action to attack with hand crossbow.
notes: Grants bonus-action hand crossbow attack under specific conditions.

name: Defensive Duelist
trigger: When hit by a melee attack while wielding a finesse weapon
mechanicalSummary: Add proficiency bonus to AC against one melee attack that hits you, potentially causing it to miss.

name: Dual Wielder
mechanicalSummary: +1 AC while dual wielding. Can use two-weapon fighting with non-light weapons. Can draw/stow two weapons instead of one.

name: Dwarf Fortitude
rechargeSummary: Hit Dice recharge on long rest
mechanicalSummary: When you take the Dodge action, spend a Hit Die to heal yourself. +1 Constitution.

name: Fade Away (Gnome)
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to become invisible until the start of your next turn. +1 Dex or Int.

name: Gift of the Chromatic Dragon
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, touch a weapon to infuse it with elemental energy for 1 minute: +1d4 acid/cold/fire/lightning/poison damage on hit. Also gain reactive resistance to one of those damage types (reaction, PB/LR).
notes: Grants both a bonus action (infuse weapon) and a reaction (damage resistance).

name: Gift of the Gem Dragon
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to deal 2d8 force damage to creatures within 10 ft (Str save half) and push them 10 ft away. +1 Int/Wis/Cha.

name: Gift of the Metallic Dragon
trigger: When you or a creature within 5 ft is hit by an attack
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to manifest spectral wings, adding PB to AC against the triggering attack. Also learn cure wounds (1/LR).

name: Grappler
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on attacks against creatures you're grappling. Can use an action to restrain a grappled creature (you also become restrained).
notes: The restrain attempt is an action.

name: Great Weapon Master
mechanicalSummary: On crit or killing blow with melee weapon, make one additional melee weapon attack as a bonus action. Can take -5 to attack for +10 damage with heavy weapons.
notes: Power attack (-5/+10) is a replacement mechanic modifying attack resolution.

name: Healer
rechargeSummary: Per creature per short or long rest (for the larger heal)
scalingSummary: Stabilize restores 1 HP; larger heal restores 1d6+4+target's HD count HP
mechanicalSummary: As an action, use healer's kit to stabilize a dying creature and restore 1 HP. As an action, restore 1d6+4+target's max Hit Dice HP to a creature (once per creature per rest).

name: Inspiring Leader
rechargeSummary: Per creature per short or long rest
mechanicalSummary: Spend 10 minutes inspiring up to 6 allies. Each gains temp HP equal to your level + Charisma modifier.

name: Mage Slayer
trigger: When a creature within 5 ft casts a spell
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to make a melee weapon attack against a creature within 5 ft that casts a spell. Also gain advantage on saves against spells cast by creatures within 5 ft.

name: Martial Adept
mechanicalSummary: Learn 2 Battle Master maneuvers. Gain 1 superiority die (d6). Functions identically to Battle Master's Combat Superiority.
notes: Grants superiority dice resource and maneuver access.

name: Metamagic Adept
mechanicalSummary: Learn 2 Metamagic options and gain 2 sorcery points. Functions identically to Sorcerer's Metamagic.
notes: Grants sorcery points resource and metamagic access.

name: Mobile
mechanicalSummary: +10 ft speed. When using Dash, difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. After making a melee attack against a creature, that creature can't make opportunity attacks against you for the rest of the turn.
notes: The no-OA-on-attack is similar to Swashbuckler's Fancy Footwork.

name: Orcish Fury (Half-Orc)
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to make one weapon attack after Relentless Endurance triggers. Also add one extra weapon die to a hit once per short/long rest.

name: Poisoner
mechanicalSummary: Apply poison to a weapon as a bonus action (normally an action). Attacks ignore resistance to poison damage.
notes: Changes poison application from action to bonus action.

name: Polearm Master
trigger: When taking the Attack action with a glaive, halberd, quarterstaff, or spear
mechanicalSummary: Make a bonus action attack with the butt end (1d4 bludgeoning). Also, creatures provoke opportunity attacks when they enter your reach with a polearm.
notes: Modifies opportunity attack trigger (enter reach, not just leave).

name: Savage Attacker
mechanicalSummary: Once per turn when rolling melee weapon damage, can reroll the weapon's damage dice and use either total.

name: Second Chance (Halfling)
mechanicalSummary: Force the attacker to reroll the attack roll. +1 Dex/Con/Cha.

name: Sentinel
mechanicalSummary: Hitting with an OA reduces target's speed to 0. Can make OA even if target used Disengage. When a creature within 5 ft attacks someone else, use reaction to make a melee weapon attack against it.
notes: Modifies universal opportunity attack rules dramatically. Grants additional reaction trigger.

name: Sharpshooter
mechanicalSummary: Ranged attacks ignore half and three-quarters cover. No disadvantage at long range. Can take -5 to attack for +10 damage on ranged weapon attacks.

name: Shield Master
mechanicalSummary: Use a bonus action to shove a creature within 5 ft. Add shield's AC bonus to Dexterity saves against spells/harmful effects. On successful Dex save for half damage, use reaction to take no damage.
notes: Bonus-action shove (normally replaces an attack in Attack action). Reaction-based damage avoidance on Dex saves.

name: Slasher
mechanicalSummary: Reduce target's speed by 10 ft until start of your next turn. On a critical hit, target has disadvantage on all attack rolls until start of your next turn.

name: Tavern Brawler
trigger: When hitting a creature with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon
mechanicalSummary: Use a bonus action to grapple a creature you hit with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon on the same turn. +1 Str/Con.
notes: Grants bonus-action grapple under specific conditions.

name: Telekinetic
mechanicalSummary: Learn mage hand (invisible, no components, extended range). As a bonus action, attempt to telekinetically shove a creature within 30 ft (Str save or moved 5 ft).

name: War Caster
mechanicalSummary: Advantage on Con saves to maintain concentration. Can perform somatic components with weapon/shield in hand. When a creature's movement provokes an OA, can use reaction to cast a spell targeting only that creature instead of making a weapon attack.
notes: Modifies opportunity attack to allow spell-casting as a reaction.

name: Crusher
mechanicalSummary: Move target 5 ft to an unoccupied space. On a critical hit, all attack rolls against that creature have advantage until start of your next turn.

name: Piercer
mechanicalSummary: Once per turn, reroll one piercing damage die. On critical hit, roll one additional damage die.

name: Elven Accuracy
mechanicalSummary: When you have advantage on a Dex/Int/Wis/Cha attack roll, reroll one of the d20s. Effectively triple advantage.

name: Lucky
trigger: When making an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, or when an attack roll is made against you
mechanicalSummary: Spend a luck point to roll an additional d20 and choose which to use. You choose whether to use this before or after the original roll, but before the outcome is determined.
